ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of points allowed by the team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "game_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_referee" TEXT /* Name of the head referee */,
  "game_tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Final result of the game */,
  "game_record" TEXT /* Team's record after the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passing_statistics" (
  "passing_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passing statistic */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the passing statistic belongs to */,
  "completions" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the team */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the team */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards gained by the team */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns scored by the team */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of passing interceptions thrown by the team */,
  "net_yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Average net yards gained per pass attempt */,
  "first_downs" INTEGER /* Number of passing first downs achieved by the team */,
  "sacks_taken" INTEGER /* Number of sacks taken by the quarterback */,
  "sack_yards_lost" INTEGER /* Total yards lost due to sacks */,
  "longest_pass" INTEGER /* Longest passing play */,
  "shortest_pass" INTEGER /* Shortest passing play */,
  "passing_yards_after_catch" INTEGER /* Total passing yards after catch */,
  "passing_touchdowns_after_catch" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns after catch */,
  "passing_interceptions_dropped" INTEGER /* Number of dropped interceptions */,
  "passing_interceptions_on_tipped" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions on tipped passes */,
  "passing_pressures" INTEGER /* Number of pressures faced by the quarterback */,
  "passing_hurries" INTEGER /* Number of hurries faced by the quarterback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passing_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_statistics" (
  "rushing_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rushing statistic */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the rushing statistic belongs to */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts by the team */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards gained by the team */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns scored by the team */,
  "yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Average yards gained per rushing attempt */,
  "first_downs" INTEGER /* Number of rushing first downs achieved by the team */,
  "longest_rush" INTEGER /* Longest rushing play */,
  "shortest_rush" INTEGER /* Shortest rushing play */,
  "rushing_yards_after_contact" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards after contact */,
  "rushing_broken_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of broken tackles */,
  "rushing_first_downs_after_contact" INTEGER /* Number of first downs after contact */,
  "rushing_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "rushing_fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  "rushing_pressures" INTEGER /* Number of pressures faced by the rusher */,
  "rushing_hurries" INTEGER /* Number of hurries faced by the rusher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rushing_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
